public static RelationBasedDynamicFilter Build<T, TLeft, TRight>(
	string urlParameterName,
	string description,
	TypedRelationData<T, TLeft> left,
	TypedRelationData<T, TRight> right,
	MultiLanguageStringData title = null
)
where T : ITypedEntityWrapper
where TLeft : ITypedEntityWrapper
where TRight : ITypedEntityWrapper
